---
title: "Data Exploration"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
---
Data exploration is the process of analyzing datasets to uncover patterns, trends, and insights. In these projects, I use statistical analysis and visualization to better understand data and support data-driven decisions.


## My Approach to Data Exploration

- Identifying trends and patterns in data
- Using visualizations to communicate insights
- Analyzing distributions and relationships
- Detecting outliers and anomalies
- Generating questions and hypotheses from data



## My Projects


**Project 1:** 

**Dataset:** (where it came from)

**Goal:**  
What were you trying to understand?

**Key Insights:**
- Insight 1 (trend, pattern, or relationship)
- Insight 2
- Insight 3

**Techniques Used:**  
Visualization, correlation analysis, etc.

[You can veiw the full Project on the side bar to your left]



**Project 2:** 

**Dataset:** (where it came from)

**Goal:**  
What were you trying to understand?

**Key Insights:**
- Insight 1 (trend, pattern, or relationship)
- Insight 2
- Insight 3

**Techniques Used:**  
Visualization, correlation analysis, etc.

[You can veiw the full Project on the side bar to your left]



**Project 3:** 

**Dataset:** (where it came from)

**Goal:**  
What were you trying to understand?

**Key Insights:**
- Insight 1 (trend, pattern, or relationship)
- Insight 2
- Insight 3

**Techniques Used:**  
Visualization, correlation analysis, etc.

[You can veiw the full Project on the side bar to your left]
